reviewer.name: Independent relocation reviewer
reviewer.independenceStatement: I did not implement the correction under review and evaluated this stack against the pinned requirements and the architecture status registry rather than accepting implementation claims.

currentArchitectureReview.architectureStatus: Complete Draft (document edit complete; implementation evidence pending; not ratified)
currentArchitectureReview.rationale: I read the complete Architecture 0.8 and acknowledge its status boundary: Complete Draft, document edit complete, implementation evidence pending, and explicitly not ratified (the status registry records no ratified architecture). The Minimal stack locally targets Architecture 0.7; Plan 0.3 is Planned and the 0.7 delivery ledger limits the claim to tested M1-M2 Complete Draft evidence, leaves M3-M5 planned, and makes no 0.7 conformance or ratification claim. The M6 handoff accurately records Architecture 0.8 as future work, including the C7 supersession where structural three-valued evaluation replaces the delivered 0.7 composite-poisoning rule (BR-07-CONSTRAINT-001/-002/-003 becomes conflicting rework) and the section 11 revocation-ceiling representation choice, and maps C1-C14 to the 0.8 adversarial vectors. This documentation relocation changed no source and no semantics, so the retained Architecture 0.5 correction evidence stays consistent with that boundary. Assessment: current deltas are recorded; this is not an Architecture 0.8 conformance claim.

gate.notes: Substantiated reproducibility at c7c2eb4 by running verify-text, verify-doc-links, verify-evidence, verify-adversarial-vectors, verify-channel-vectors, verify-project-graph, verify-binding-measurements, verify-assembly-graph, and verify-sdk (all exit 0), and building both stacks warning-free (Reference .sln and Minimal .slnx, 0 warnings / 0 errors). In-process evidence suites executed green at this commit: Reference Core.Tests 30, Conformance 18, Extensions.Tests 3; Minimal Conformance 24. The full .\build\verify-interchange.ps1 (which also runs the cross-process interchange suites and the independent-review completeness step) completes once this review closure is committed; these two attestations are the input that step requires.

requirements.summary: Canonical names parse ConceptPath and AuthorityPath:ConceptPath without relative or ambiguous notation.
requirements.matrixRationale: The parser supports authority-qualified canonical names and rejects ambiguous separators.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive BR_05_NAME_001 and negative authority::concept (ambiguous separator rejected) anchors are reachable and passed in Brontide.Minimal.Conformance (24 passed). The parser supports authority-qualified canonical names and rejects ambiguous notation. Relocation changed no source. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Vocabulary versions are claims rather than semantic identity; only Shapes and Declared Fragments carry structural versions.
requirements.matrixRationale: Operation and Event references are name-only; Shape and Fragment references retain positive structural versions.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: BR_05_NAME_002 positive and operationFields negative anchors passed in Minimal.Conformance; Operation and Event references are name-only while Shape and Fragment references retain positive structural versions. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Actor and authority references are issuer-controlled, unambiguous, stable, and comparable within an authority domain.
requirements.matrixRationale: Issued reference representations are private, foreign-domain references are rejected, and deterministic allocation lineages distinguish semantically different persistent branches without breaking replay of the same transition.

negativeEvidence.anchor: discarded persistent branch cannot recycle opaque references

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24); positive source anchor in Model.fs present
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive source anchor type ActorReference = private is present in Model.fs; negatives BR_05_AUTH_001 and discarded persistent branch cannot recycle opaque references passed in Minimal.Conformance. Issued references are private and opaque, foreign-domain references are rejected, and distinct persistent branches do not recycle identities. Conforms.

requirements.summary: An Execution explicitly presents a Capability whose holder, target, and Operation scope match the request at the target boundary.
requirements.matrixRationale: The only public execution path requires initiator, target, presented Capability, Operation, and input.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive BR_05_EXEC_001 and negatives BR_05_AUTH_002, BR_05_AUTH_003, BR_05_AUTH_004 passed in Minimal.Conformance. The only public execution path (World.step) requires initiator, target, presented Capability, Operation, and input, denying wrong holder, target, or capability before effects. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Every effective Capability Constraint is evaluated conjunctively and unknown or failed Constraints deny before effects.
requirements.matrixRationale: Operation requirements and every Capability derivation requirement are evaluated conjunctively.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive evaluators = Map.ofList conjunctive-evaluation anchor and negative BR_05_AUTH_005 passed in Minimal.Conformance; the Operation requirement and every Capability derivation requirement are evaluated conjunctively and unknown constraints deny. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Delegation changes the holder, preserves inherited target and Operation scope, appends Constraints, and records its parent and issuer.
requirements.matrixRationale: The API cannot express a replacement operation set or target and records parent plus delegator.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24); negative source anchor in Kernel.fs present
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive BR_05_DELEGATION_001 passed in Minimal.Conformance; negative source anchor Operations = parent.Operations in Kernel.fs shows the API cannot express a replacement operation set or target and records parent plus delegator. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Primordial authority and later Genesis occurrences are bounded, enumerable, and attributable to domain policy.
requirements.matrixRationale: Genesis records policy, introduced identities, and time. One shared authority-domain coordinator serializes Genesis and runtime across every persistent World alias; contexts issue only into their exact transaction branch, uncommitted branches remain invalid, discarded or failed identities cannot collide with accepted authority, and nested Genesis or runtime dispatch is blocked while the transaction is active.

negativeEvidence.anchor: failed Genesis does not recycle escaped authority references
discarded persistent branch cannot recycle opaque references
failed Genesis invalidates transaction branches and rejects original aliases
active Genesis blocks runtime and nesting through original alias

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive BR_05_GENESIS_001 and the four negative anchors (failed Genesis does not recycle escaped authority references; discarded persistent branch cannot recycle opaque references; failed Genesis invalidates transaction branches and rejects original aliases; active Genesis blocks runtime and nesting through original alias) passed in Minimal.Conformance. One coordinator serializes Genesis and runtime, and rolled-back or discarded identities cannot collide with accepted authority. Conforms.

requirements.summary: The requested effect begins only after explicit target-side authority, Shape, and Constraint validation.
requirements.matrixRationale: Handlers are selected only after target, Capability, Shape, and Constraint checks.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive BR_05_EXEC_001 and negative invoked, Is.False passed in Minimal.Conformance; handlers are selected only after target, Capability, Shape, and Constraint checks. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Rejected attempts remain observable Executions while protected command payloads are excluded from denial audit records.
requirements.matrixRationale: Every denial allocates an Execution audit record without the command or payload.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: I read the negative test: with status Denied the audit field set Does.Not.Contain Command and Does.Not.Contain Payload, so every denial allocates an Execution audit record without the protected command or payload. Positive BR_05_AUTH_002 present. Passed in Minimal.Conformance. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Trusted target time is explicit, scoped to a time domain, monotonic where claimed, and distinct from attributable sender marks.
requirements.matrixRationale: Environment supplies the target-trusted Temporal Mark; domain mismatch and regression deny.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive BR_05_TIME_001 and negative ForeignClock (domain mismatch and regression deny) passed in Minimal.Conformance; the environment supplies the target-trusted Temporal Mark, distinct from attributable sender marks. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Events are immutable assertions that preserve emitter attribution, causation, declared Shape, and original temporal claims.
requirements.matrixRationale: Event definitions validate assertion Shape and committed Events preserve emitter, causation, and time.

positiveEvidence.anchor: explicit issue delegate execute and Event attribution path succeeds

negativeEvidence.anchor: An emitted Event names an unknown emitter

Committed Events preserve emitter, causation, and time. Conforms.

requirements.summary: An Outcome is a terminal Event for one identifiable Execution or activity, with distinct success result and failure detail Shapes.
requirements.matrixRationale: ExecutionOutcome composes an attributed Event, names its terminal Execution, and separates result from shaped failure details.

requirements.summary: Shape identity is semantic and supports unit, scalar, record, sequence, choice, and opaque contracts without CLR assignability.
requirements.matrixRationale: All six Base Shape kinds exist and validation is keyed by semantic ShapeReference.

negativeEvidence.anchor: The value does not match the declared shape

requirements.summary: Same-name Shape versions are monotonic and additive; breaking structure or meaning requires a new canonical name.
requirements.matrixRationale: Registration verifies prior fields, optional additions, body kind, and fragment policy.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive BR_05_SHAPE_001 and negative invalidV2 passed in Minimal.Conformance; registration verifies prior fields, optional additions, body kind, and fragment policy, rejecting breaking redefinition. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Open Shapes accept valid authored Fragments through canonical projection, required Fragments fail closed, and closed Shapes reject attachment.
requirements.matrixRationale: Canonical projection enforces required Fragments, rejects authored attachments outside their declared host Shape lineage, accepts later compatible host versions, and honors explicit inclusion.

positiveEvidence.anchor: BR_05_SHAPE_003 authored fragments stay within their host Shape lineage

negativeEvidence.anchor: The fragment is not declared for that host Shape lineage.

testsRun: Brontide.Minimal.Conformance passed at c7c2eb4 (Failed: 0, Passed: 24)
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: Positive BR_05_SHAPE_003 authored fragments stay within their host Shape lineage and negative The fragment is not declared for that host Shape lineage. passed in Minimal.Conformance; canonical projection enforces required Fragments and rejects authored attachments outside their declared host Shape lineage. Conforms.

requirements.summary: Cross-stack component evidence crosses an external boundary without sharing implementation-private runtime types or authority objects.
requirements.matrixRationale: The retained full gate launches the independently built Reference provider process for Cooling and Catalog/resource proofs. This is experimental interchange evidence, not protocol ratification.

positiveEvidence.anchor: compatible activation success forwarding provenance and host Enrichment are visible
Catalog nested batch two operations and explicit failure cross the Reference process

testsRun: Cross-process InterchangeTests run under full .\build\verify-interchange.ps1 (completes at review closure); verify-boundaries guard present
Gate at c7c2eb4: nine verify-*.ps1 scripts + Reference and Minimal builds all exit 0 (0 warnings)
review.rationale: The positive cross-process anchors in InterchangeTests.fs are reachable; the negative guard verify-boundaries.ps1 forbids any Brontide.Reference reference. The cross-process suites run under the full verify-interchange gate (7/7 at the byte-identical prior conforming baseline; completes here once the review closure is committed). No Capability or implementation-private type crosses the process seam, so this is demonstrated experimental interchange, not ratification. Conforms.

attestation.statement: I attest that this record accurately reports my independent review of the pinned commit and the architecture selected by the status registry.
